input.diff:
diff --git a/setup/05-programming-languages.sh b/setup/05-programming-languages.sh
--- a/setup/05-programming-languages.sh
+++ b/setup/05-programming-languages.sh
@@ -22,10 +22,17 @@
-# ---- Rust (stable) ----
+# ---- Rust (stable, system-wide) ----
+export RUSTUP_HOME=/usr/local/rustup
+export CARGO_HOME=/usr/local/cargo
 curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable
-export PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:$PATH"
+cat > /etc/profile.d/rust.sh <<'RUSTENV'
+export RUSTUP_HOME=/usr/local/rustup
+export CARGO_HOME=/usr/local/cargo
+export PATH="/usr/local/cargo/bin:$PATH"
+RUSTENV
+chmod 755 /usr/local/rustup /usr/local/cargo

diff --git a/setup/12-shell-environment.sh b/setup/12-shell-environment.sh
--- a/setup/12-shell-environment.sh
+++ b/setup/12-shell-environment.sh
@@ -35,10 +35,8 @@
-# Neovim
-curl -Lo /usr/local/bin/nvim "https://github.com/neovim/neovim/releases/latest/download/nvim.appimage" 2>/dev/null && \
-  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/nvim || \
-  apt-get install -y neovim
+# Neovim (apt preferred -- AppImage often fails on Ubuntu 24.04)
+apt-get install -y neovim

diff --git a/setup/10-security-tools.sh b/setup/10-security-tools.sh
--- a/setup/10-security-tools.sh
+++ b/setup/10-security-tools.sh
@@ -55,15 +55,26 @@
-# ---- Python OSINT & security tools ----
-pip3 install --break-system-packages \
-  sherlock-project maigret dnsrecon sublist3r scoutsuite \
-  impacket pwntools scapy volatility3 oletools pdfid hashid arjun
+# ---- Python OSINT & security tools (uv tool for isolation + speed) ----
+command -v uv &>/dev/null || curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
+uv tool install sherlock-project 2>/dev/null || true
+uv tool install maigret 2>/dev/null || true
+uv tool install dnsrecon 2>/dev/null || true

diff --git a/variables.tf b/variables.tf
--- a/variables.tf
+++ b/variables.tf
@@ -64,7 +64,13 @@
 variable "os_disk_size_gb" {
-  default     = 256
+  default     = 512
+}
+
+variable "hf_token" {
+  description = "HuggingFace API token for downloading gated models"
+  type        = string
+  sensitive   = true
 }

diff --git a/.gitignore b/.gitignore
--- a/.gitignore
+++ b/.gitignore
@@ -6,6 +6,10 @@
+# Secrets (never commit)
+secrets.auto.tfvars
+*.secret.tfvars

diff --git a/main.tf b/main.tf
--- a/main.tf
+++ b/main.tf
@@ -133,5 +133,7 @@
-  custom_data = base64encode(file("${path.module}/cloud-init.yaml"))
+  custom_data = base64encode(templatefile("${path.module}/cloud-init.yaml", {
+    hf_token = var.hf_token
+  }))

diff --git a/setup/07-gpu-drivers.sh b/setup/07-gpu-drivers.sh
--- a/setup/07-gpu-drivers.sh
+++ b/setup/07-gpu-drivers.sh
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
-apt-get install -y cuda-toolkit-12-4
+apt-get install -y cuda-toolkit-12-8
+
+# Verify GPU access
+nvidia-smi || echo 'WARNING: nvidia-smi failed'

diff --git a/benchmarks/run_orchestrator.sh b/benchmarks/run_orchestrator.sh
--- a/benchmarks/run_orchestrator.sh
+++ b/benchmarks/run_orchestrator.sh
@@ -43,8 +43,10 @@
-declare -a MODEL_SLUGS=("gemma4-31b" "glm47-flash")
+declare -a MODEL_SLUGS=("gemma4-31b-awq" "gemma4-31b-bf16" "llama4-scout" "glm47-flash")
 declare -A HF_MODELS=(
-    ["gemma4-31b"]="google/gemma-4-31B-it"
+    ["gemma4-31b-awq"]="cyankiwi/gemma-4-31B-it-AWQ-4bit"
+    ["gemma4-31b-bf16"]="google/gemma-4-31B-it"
+    ["llama4-scout"]="meta-llama/Llama-4-Scout-17B-16E-Instruct"

diff --git a/cloud-init.yaml b/cloud-init.yaml
--- a/cloud-init.yaml
+++ b/cloud-init.yaml
@@ -100,6 +100,20 @@
+- path: /etc/skel/.claude/settings.json
+  permissions: '0644'
+  content: "{\n  \"defaultMode\": \"bypassPermissions\",\n  \"env\": {\n    \"ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL\": \"http://localhost:8000\"\n  }\n}"

diff --git a/setup/08-ai-ml-stack.sh b/setup/08-ai-ml-stack.sh
--- a/setup/08-ai-ml-stack.sh
+++ b/setup/08-ai-ml-stack.sh
@@ -10,8 +10,12 @@
-pip install vllm
+# vLLM nightly for Gemma 4 support (requires transformers 5.5.0)
+uv pip install --python /opt/vllm-env/bin/python -U vllm --pre \
+  --extra-index-url https://wheels.vllm.ai/nightly/cu129 \
+  --index-strategy unsafe-best-match
+uv pip install --python /opt/vllm-env/bin/python transformers==5.5.0

diff --git a/setup/15-linters-formatters-lsp.sh b/setup/15-linters-formatters-lsp.sh
new file mode 100755
--- /dev/null
+++ b/setup/15-linters-formatters-lsp.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,108 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+# SECTION 15: LINTERS, FORMATTERS & LSP SERVERS
+# Install code quality tools for multiple languages
+
+# Python
+uv tool install ruff
+uv tool install pyright
+
+# JavaScript/TypeScript
+npm install -g eslint prettier typescript-language-server
+
+# Shell
+apt-get install -y shellcheck
+GO111MODULE=on go install mvdan.cc/sh/v3/cmd/shfmt@latest
